title: Change Log Entry
description: A single entry in the project change log, recording a change request, its classification, impact assessment, and approval status.

description.description: Description of the change being requested or logged

phase.description: Lifecycle phase in which this change was raised

type.description: Classification of the change: incremental (within agreed scope) or significant (scope/cost/timeline impact)

requested_by.description: Person or role who requested the change

impact_assessment.description: Assessment of the change impact across key dimensions

schedule.description: Impact on project schedule (e.g. +2 weeks, none)

quality.description: Impact on quality or test coverage

risk.description: New or changed risks introduced by this change

approved_by.description: Person or role who approved the change

re_gate_required.description: Whether this change requires a re-gate review

change_request_id.description: Reference to a formal change request document if applicable
